subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The letter of the sixth of Sha'bán was received, and from its contents complete joy was attained, for it was [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه ۶ شعبان واصل و از مضمون سرور کامل حاصل گردید زیرا دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
